codex.verified: 2026-06-13: `codex exec --help` says instructions are read from stdin when PROMPT is omitted or `-` is used, and documents --ephemeral for runs without persisted session files. Runtime checks may still require user-approved escalation when Codex needs access to CODEX_HOME state or app-server resources.

claude-code.verified: Configure only after verifying the local Claude Code CLI command, stdin behavior, output, exit-code semantics, and runtime permission behavior.

cursor-agent.verified: Configure only after verifying the local Cursor Agent CLI command, stdin behavior, output, exit-code semantics, and runtime permission behavior.

custom.verified: Set command and runtime_check_command to non-empty string arrays after verifying the provider accepts prompts on stdin, returns meaningful exit codes, and can access required runtime state.
